image_prompt: SVG: line graph of % bacteria remaining on lens (y, 0-100, ticks every 10) vs Time / hours (x, 0-9). Two series — one-step (teal, near-flat: 100 at 0h falling to ~95% by 2h and staying ~95% to 8h) and two-step (orange, steep: 100 at 0h, 95 at 1h, 80 at 2h, 20 at 4h, 5 at 6h, 2 at 8h). Cross markers, legend keyed one step / two step.

topic: HF dissolving in water — temperature change
image_prompt: SVG: Before/After diagram of a beaker of water with a thermometer, each with a magnified circular gauge. Before reads 25°C (red column between the 20 and 30 marks); After reads 39°C (red column just below the 40 mark). Centre dashed divider, 'Before' in teal, 'After' in red. Clean lab apparatus.

SVG: four-stage sequence (red arrows between) of a lidded vessel modelled on a rocket engine. Stage 1 labelled String, Fuel source, Catalyst (small tube on string), H₂O₂; stage 2 tube lowered into liquid; stage 3 reaction bubbles with a glowing splint at the mouth; stage 4 tall blue Flame and escaping O₂(g). Ground band beneath.

SVG: same eudiometer set-up (eudiometer, Water beaker, Stopper, Catalyst container, H₂O₂, Stopwatch reading 0:30) with a magnifier-circle inset highlighting the stopper/tubing not seated on the flask neck, gas escaping through the gap, caption 'Stopper not sealed — gas escapes'. Explains the inconsistent 50 cm³ result.

topic: H₂O₂ hair bleaching swatches & concentration bottles
image_prompt: SVG: top — ruled 'Time / min' vs 'Colour' table with rows 0, 30, 60, 90 and five hair-colour swatch columns that lighten progressively down each column (black→blonde range). Bottom — row of five H₂O₂ bottles labelled 3% (10 VOL), 6% (20 VOL), 9% (30 VOL), 10.5% (35 VOL), 12% (40 VOL).

SVG: open-notebook infographic, two pages. Left 'Made from papyrus plant' (reeds, scroll) with notes: grows in aquatic areas/full sun; lasts several thousand years; fibres change light to darker yellow; high mould resistance; stable in dry conditions; difficult to fold, loses flexibility. Right 'Made from wood' (tree, acid-free paper sheet) with notes: trees grow in most climates; wood fibres react with air to yellow; lasts 500–1000 years; fibres weakened by light/heat; sunlight causes brittleness; moisture causes mould; made in different thicknesses; flexible/easily folded; contains a base that reacts with CO₂ in air to stop yellowing.

SVG: two process-flow panels. 'From tree to paper' (warm) with 5 steps: 1 trees broken down to pulp; 2 chemical pulping cooked under heat/pressure with chemicals; 3 pulp washed/decontaminated; 4 chemically treated to white paper (chlorine, oxygen, or H₂O₂); 5 water removed and pressed into paper. 'From paper to paper' (green recycling loop) with 5 steps: 1 used paper collected/sorted; 2 mixed with water, chopped/blended to pulp; 3 filtered to remove dirt/plastic/metals; 4 ink removed with detergents; 5 water removed and pressed into paper.

SVG: original two-column icon grid (replacing a copyrighted photo collage) contrasting 'Paper & physical archives' (framed art, library books, open book, museum globe, historic scroll) with 'Electronic & cloud storage' (smartphone/QR, CDs/DVDs, floppy disks, VR headset, laptop, tablet/e-reader, cloud).
